allow: PowerShell(py -c "import urllib.request,re; req=urllib.request.Request\('https://www.rockyshop.de/bad/armaturen/waschtisch-armaturen/', headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) PrisSync/1.0'}\); h=urllib.request.urlopen\(req,timeout=45\).read\(\).decode\('utf-8','replace'\); print\('len',len\(h\)\); print\('product-image count', h.count\('product-image'\)\); print\('Artikelnummer count', h.count\('Artikelnummer'\)\); i=h.find\('class=\\"product-image\\"'\); print\(repr\(h[max\(0,i-400\):i+200]\)\)")
